Control_Description: Develop and maintain a cybersecurity strategy that prioritizes the protection of critical systems and national infrastructure in compliance with NCA guidelines
Conduct annual cybersecurity risk assessments and maintain a regularly reviewed risk register for critical systems per NCA CSCC requirements
Integrate security requirements into IT project management including secure development practices testing procedures and deployment controls
Conduct annual cybersecurity implementation reviews by the cybersecurity function and independent third-party audits every three years
Implement personnel screening and vetting for all workers with access to critical systems and ensure technical positions are filled by experienced professionals
Harden virtual machine configurations by applying security baselines disabling unnecessary services and periodically checking for missing system updates
Implement virtual network segmentation and isolation for workloads using network security groups and defined security boundaries
Encrypt all storage at rest using strong government-approved encryption algorithms including customer-managed key options
Enable secure boot and trusted platform module capabilities for virtual machines to ensure hardware-level integrity
Implement API gateway controls including authentication authorization rate limiting and monitoring for all exposed APIs
Enable database encryption audit logging least-privilege access controls and disable public network access for all database services
Scan container images for vulnerabilities and enforce pod security policies in all containerized environments
Implement least-privilege access and secure secret management for all serverless functions and cloud-native services
Classify all data based on sensitivity levels per NCA and NDMO classification guidelines before deploying to cloud environments
Apply data masking and anonymization techniques for non-production environments containing sensitive or personal data
Ensure all data is stored in compliant geographic regions in accordance with Saudi data localization requirements and government policy
Define and enforce data retention policies and implement secure deletion procedures per NDMO data lifecycle standards
Implement federated identity with single sign-on capabilities aligned with national identity infrastructure and government directories
Implement just-in-time privileged access management for all administrative operations including approval workflows and audit trails
Secure monitor and regularly rotate service account credentials and managed identity configurations
Conduct periodic access reviews and certifications for all users with access to critical systems and sensitive data
Enable DDoS protection for all internet-facing government and critical infrastructure services
Deploy web application firewall with OWASP rule sets for all public-facing web applications and APIs
Use private endpoints for all PaaS services to eliminate public internet exposure for cloud-hosted services
Implement comprehensive network traffic monitoring flow logging and threat analysis capabilities
Centralize security logs to a SIEM solution for correlation alerting and incident investigation
Integrate threat intelligence feeds and share indicators of compromise with national cybersecurity authorities including NCA
Automate security response and remediation workflows for known threat patterns and policy violations
Continuously scan for and remediate vulnerabilities within NCA-mandated timeframes and patching schedules
Map all controls to applicable Saudi regulatory frameworks including NCA CSCC NDMO and PDPL requirements
Enable comprehensive audit logging for all administrative actions data access events and configuration changes
Generate and maintain compliance reports and evidence packages for submission to regulatory authorities
Obtain and maintain third-party security certifications and attestations as required by NCA for critical systems
Implement automated and tested backup and recovery procedures for all critical systems and data
Establish data governance authority define data management roles (CDO Data Stewards) and implement oversight policies per NDMO framework
Maintain a comprehensive enterprise data catalog with metadata management lineage tracking and data discovery capabilities
Define and enforce data quality standards for accuracy completeness consistency and timeliness of government data
Define enterprise data architecture standards aligned with Saudi e-Government technical standards and interoperability requirements
Enable standardized data interoperability between government entities using NDMO-approved data exchange standards
Protect personal data in compliance with Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) and NDMO privacy standards
Obtain valid legal basis for all personal data processing activities including robust consent management mechanisms
Implement mechanisms for data subjects to exercise rights including access correction portability and deletion of personal data
Enable secure and authorized data sharing between government entities per NDMO data sharing framework and approved agreements
Establish formal data sharing agreements defining responsibilities security requirements usage restrictions and audit obligations
